recipes.name: French Style Mustard Seitan
recipes.description: A vegetarian take on a retro classic. Inspired by a recipe from the New York Times.
ingredients: 2 tbsps milk (dairy, oat, or whatever your preference)
instructions: Heat olive oil in low medium heat in a medium skillet or dutch oven
When oil is hot, add the shallot with pinch of salt
Cook shallot for 5-8 minutes, until it browns
Add the wine, cook down until its evaporated about 5-10 minutes
Add the vegetable broth and the whole grain dijon mustard, cook for 5 minutes
Turn the heat to low, add the dijon mustard and the milk
Serve immediately over the seitan, garnishing with chopped parsely
Serve with mashed potatoes, roasted potatoes, or rice and a side of vegetables

recipes.name: Basic Mashed Potatoes
ingredients: 5 large russet potatoes, peeled and chopped into 1 inch chunks
Water for boiling, enough to cover the potatoes
Small slice of onion or shallot
1/2 a rib of celery, with leaves if possible
1 tbsp butter chopped into small chunks
Milk (dairy, oat, or whatever your preference)
instructions: Chop potatoes
Place potatoes in a large pot
Cover with water, add vegetables and bay leaf
Turn heat on high, boil for 15-20 minutes
Checking the potatoes periodically to see if they are ready
If a fork can easily enter them then they are ready
Drain off water. Note: you can keep it for broth if you wish
Discard the celery etc. Put the potatoes back in the pot
Add the chopped up butter and milk
Mash with a potato masher
Serve immediately

recipes.name: Seitan Chikun Marsala
recipes.description: Enjoy a delicious plant-based version of the classic Chicken Marsala
instructions: Dredge seitan cutlets in flour seasoned with salt an pepper
Sear in a hot skillet with oil until golden brown on both sides
Remove cutlets and set aside
For the Marsala sauce, saute the mushrooms until golden brown
Add garlic and cook for 30 seconds
Deglaze pan with Marsala wine
Add vegetable broth and blended cashews
Simmer until sauce thickens
Return the cutlets to the sauce
Warm through for 2-3 minutes
Garnish with fresh parsley

recipes.name: Sauteed Broccoli with Garlic
instructions: Bring a large pot with a steaming tray to boil
Once the water is boiling, add the broccoli to the tray
Steam the broccoli for 4 minutes
Add olive oil to a medium skillet, set heat to high
Once skillet is hot add the garlic for minute until it sizzles
Add broccoli and toss until it gets browned
Serve immediately

recipes.name: Simple Red Pasta Sauce
ingredients: small bunch of chopped fresh basil
instructions: Add olive oil to a sauce pan. Once hot add the onions for 4 minutes
Add garlic cook for 1 minute
Add tomatoes. Add tomato paste and spices and salt
Bring to a boil. Once boiling reduce to a simmer and cook partially covered for 30 min

recipes.name: Lentils and Rice
recipes.description: Flavorful middle eastern dish. Spiced with cumin seed.
instructions: Pick stones out of lentils
Rinse rice
Boil lentils for 10 minutes until cooked, set aside
Sautee garlic in oil
Add lentils and rice to garlic, add water and bouillion
Bring to a boil then stir once, set to simmer on low heat covered for 15 minutes.
Turn off heat and remove lid. Let sit for 5 minutes and serve
